2026-04-13.caption:
Did You Know? Upgrading your battery tech changes everything. 📊

Still running a standard lead-acid battery? If your vehicle has high electrical demands, start-stop technology, or tackles rough terrain, it might be time to rethink your power source.

// The Standard Lead Acid Reality:
⚠️ Basic cranking power.
⚠️ Highly sensitive to harsh off-road vibrations.
⚠️ Shorter lifespan under heavy electrical loads.

// The AGM (Absorbent Glass Mat) Advantage:
⚡ Massive CCA Output: Instant, reliable starts, even in extreme conditions.
⚡ 100% Vibration Proof: Rugged, sealed construction built for South African roads.
⚡ 3x Longer Lifespan: Completely maintenance-free and engineered to outlast the standard.

Stop settling for basic power. Upgrade your vehicle's reliability and performance today.

Your safety starts where the rubber meets the road! 🚗💨

Did you know that worn-out tyre treads significantly increase your braking distance—especially in the rain? Don't leave your safety to chance. ⛈️

Bring your vehicle to Alberton Tyre Clinic for a professional Tread Wear Assessment. Our expert team will check your depth and condition to ensure you're road-legal and, more importantly, safe.

Why check your tread?
✅ Better grip and handling
✅ Shorter braking distances
✅ Prevent hydroplaning in the wet
✅ Peace of mind for you and your family

Don't wait until it's too late. Visit us today for a comprehensive inspection!
